summary: V3 Live Data Service and VPS Architecture Testing Complete - All 12 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend tests passed. GET /api/v3/live-status returns valid JSON with running, connected, symbols (MNQ/MES), error_count. V3 signal returns live_connected=false and data_source=simulated/databento_trades (correct for preview env with ENABLE_LIVE_DATA=false). POST /api/v3/execute/MNQ?force=true creates paper orders. POST /api/analyze returns ofi.source and vwap.upper_3/lower_3 bands. GET /api/v3/regimes returns 5 regimes with score_components. Frontend V3 panel shows HIST badge (not LIVE) since live is disabled. Deploy scripts at /app/deploy/ ready for VPS deployment.
passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/v3/live-status returns valid JSON with: running, connected, symbols, error_count
✅ GET /api/v3/live-status shows symbols.MNQ and symbols.MES with: connected, trades_received, buffer_size, ofi_fast, ofi_slow, absorption
✅ GET /api/v3/live-status in preview env: running=false, connected=false (ENABLE_LIVE_DATA not set)
✅ GET /api/v3/signal/MNQ when live disabled: live_connected=false, data_source=simulated or databento_trades
✅ POST /api/v3/execute/MNQ?force=true creates paper order with status=paper_executed
✅ GET /api/v3/orders returns orders list with count
✅ POST /api/analyze returns vwap with upper_3 and lower_3 fields (±3σ bands)
✅ GET /api/v3/regimes returns 5 regimes (COMPLACENCIA, BULL, TRANSICAO, BEAR, CAPITULACAO) with score_components
✅ Frontend: V3 panel visible with data-testid=v3-signal-panel
✅ Frontend: HIST badge shown (not LIVE) since live is disabled
✅ Frontend: V3 live badge (data-testid=v3-live-badge) NOT present when live disabled
✅ Deploy scripts present at /app/deploy/: deploy.sh, supervisor.conf, nginx.conf
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_v3_live_data.py (new test file for V3 live data service)
test_credentials: No auth needed - public API endpoints. DataBento API key in backend/.env
seed_data_creation: V3 orders created via force=true execution during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: V3 Live Data Service and VPS Architecture fully tested. Key findings: 1) GET /api/v3/live-status returns service status with symbols.MNQ and symbols.MES containing connected, trades_received, buffer_size, ofi_fast, ofi_slow, absorption fields. 2) In preview env (ENABLE_LIVE_DATA=false), running=false, connected=false. 3) GET /api/v3/signal/{symbol} returns live_connected (bool) and data_source (string). 4) When live disabled: live_connected=false, data_source=simulated or databento_trades. 5) POST /api/analyze returns ofi.source and vwap.upper_3/lower_3 (±3σ bands). 6) GET /api/v3/regimes returns 5 regimes with score_components. 7) Frontend V3 panel shows HIST badge when live disabled, LIVE badge (data-testid=v3-live-badge) only when live_connected=true. 8) Deploy scripts at /app/deploy/ ready for VPS: deploy.sh (setup/start/stop/status/logs), supervisor.conf, nginx.conf. 9) LiveDataService runs as asyncio background task on FastAPI startup when ENABLE_LIVE_DATA=true.

feature_verification.v3_live_status_endpoint: Working - GET /api/v3/live-status returns running, connected, symbols, error_count
feature_verification.v3_live_status_symbols: Working - MNQ and MES with connected, trades_received, buffer_size, ofi_fast, ofi_slow, absorption
feature_verification.analyze_vwap_3sigma: Working - POST /api/analyze returns vwap.upper_3 and vwap.lower_3
feature_verification.v3_regimes: Working - GET /api/v3/regimes returns 5 regimes with score_components
feature_verification.frontend_hist_badge: Working - HIST badge shown when live disabled
feature_verification.frontend_live_badge_absent: Working - LIVE badge (data-testid=v3-live-badge) not present when live disabled

mocked_api_note: No APIs mocked. Live Data Service is disabled in preview (ENABLE_LIVE_DATA=false). DataBento trades return simulated/empty on weekends (expected behavior). Paper trading is the default mode.
